top_signals.title: Europe's AI stocks shine through gloom of Iran war - Reuters
top_signals.summary: Europe's AI stocks shine through gloom of Iran war  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: South Korea to review scrapping crypto tax plan after national petition hits 50,000 signatures
top_signals.summary: The petitioner said taxing cryptocurrency gains while abolishing taxes on traditional investments is unfair.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Indonesia to ‘Listen to Market’ After Shock Commodity Plan
top_signals.summary: Indonesia is “listening very closely” to the market as it builds a body to oversee key commodity exports, according to Pandu Sjahrir, chief investment officer at Danantara, after a shock announcement that sowed confusion among traders and producers this week.

top_signals.title: Perpetua Resources gets $2.9B EXIM loan for Stibnite gold-antimony project in Idaho
top_signals.summary: Last year, the company began early works construction at the project, which was fast-tracked by the Trump administration.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Smarsh Introduces New Anthropic Integration to Capture and Govern Claude Enterprise Data Within Its Platform
top_signals.summary: New integration brings generative AI interactions into full compliance visibility—allowing Smarsh to supervise and detect risk within existing workflows
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
